name: Stuffed Date Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Slit the dates (about 8 ounces) and stuff them with pecan halves; set aside.
2. In a saucepan, melt butter or margarine and stir in brown sugar until well blended. Remove from heat and let cool to lukewarm.
3. Blend in sour cream, beaten eggs, and vanilla; mix thoroughly.
4. Stir together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and ground ginger with the sour cream mixture; mix well.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
6. Carefully arrange the stuffed dates in lengthwise rows on top of the batter, placing about six stuffed dates in each row.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 25 to 30 minutes.
8. Let cool; cut into bars, allowing one date per bar. Optionally, sift powdered sugar over the top if desired.
9. Makes 30 bars.
